data.title: Early detection system for Alzheimer's wins SAS Hackathon
data.description: DementAI, developed by Katalyze Data and showcased at SAS INNOVATE in Dallas on April 29, 2026, is powered by SAS Viya. This innovative system won the fifth global SAS Hackathon and is designed to assist clinical teams in detecting subtle patterns of decline earlier, thus enhancing patient care. By leveraging AI technology, DementAI aims to improve the early identification of such patterns, ultimately leading to better treatment outcomes.

data.title: PL-Universe Launches World's First Submillimeter Data Acquisition Solution for Physical AI
data.description: Yesterday at the MagicLab CONNECT Global Embodied Intelligence Innovation Summit in Santa Clara, California, PL-Universe Robotics, an ecosystem partner of MagicLab, unveiled AcCI (Accuracy-Closed-loop Integration), marking the world's premier fusion-based innovation. This cutting-edge technology aims to revolutionize the robotics industry by combining unmatched precision and closed-loop integration. The unveiling garnered significant attention from attendees and industry professionals.

data.title: PVH Corp. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: PVH Corp. [NYSE: PVH] has revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0375 per share, with payment scheduled for June 24, 2026, to shareholders on record as of June 3, 2026. PVH is renowned as one of the leading fashion companies globally, with a strong presence in over 40 countries. The company's success is attributed to its iconic brands, Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER, which have been connecting with consumers worldwide for over 140 years. PVH continues to inspire and engage a diverse range of customers with its innovative fashion offerings.

data.title: DealerFire Helps Dealerships Turn Online Leads into Sales with Smarter Follow-Up Strategies
data.description: Cutting-edge digital solutions are revolutionizing dealerships by enabling them to enhance response times, customize outreach efforts, and boost conversion rates. Based in WESTLAKE, Texas, on April 29, 2026, DealerFire is at the forefront of this transformation. Today, dealers are tasked with converting online inquiries into physical showroom visits and finalized transactions. DealerFire's tools and strategies are instrumental in achieving this goal.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum decrease as Federal Reserve keeps rates unchanged for the third consecutive time.
data.description: A recent report highlighted the alarming rise in cyberattacks globally, with a staggering 300% increase in incidents reported over the past year. The data showed that around 1.5 million cyberattacks were attempted each day, targeting various sectors such as finance, healthcare, and government organizations. This surge in cyber threats has prompted experts to advise companies to significantly enhance their cybersecurity measures to protect against potential data breaches and financial losses. Furthermore, the report emphasized the importance of adopting robust security protocols and investing in cybersecurity training for employees to mitigate the growing risks posed by cybercriminals.

data.title: 5 Stones intelligence (5Si)® Expands Leadership Team With Senior Experts From CIA, NSA, and Homeland Security Investigations
data.description: In Miami, Florida, 5Si is enhancing its leadership team by welcoming senior hires from the CIA, NSA, and HSI. This move aims to bolster the company's worldwide capabilities in areas such as threat intelligence, human intelligence (HUMINT), and risk advisory.

data.title: CFTC files lawsuit against Wisconsin over prediction market regulation, its fifth state-level legal battle.
data.description: Wisconsin is facing a lawsuit from the CFTC, becoming the fifth state targeted by the commission in legal actions aiming to regulate prediction markets such as Kalshi and Polymarket. The CFTC is pushing to assert its jurisdiction over these platforms in an ongoing effort to enforce regulatory oversight.
